subtasks.title: Implement websocket connector with recovery
subtasks.details: Build broker connector with ping/heartbeat, retry policy, jitter backoff, and stale-feed detection.
acceptance_criteria: Automatic reconnect within defined SLA after disconnect.
Heartbeat alarms generated on stale stream.
questions: Should reconnect fallback to reduced symbol set under repeated failures?

subtasks.title: Build instrument and expiry resolver
subtasks.details: Maintain mapping between symbols, strikes, expiries, and broker instrument tokens with daily refresh jobs.
acceptance_criteria: Resolver returns valid token for active expiry.
Rollover logic tested across weekly/monthly expiry.
questions: Do we prioritize weekly expiries by default for recommendations?

subtasks.title: Create candle builder service
subtasks.details: Aggregate ticks into OHLCV candles and publish final candle events on close.
acceptance_criteria: Late ticks handled without corrupting closed candles.
questions: Should we allow candle correction window after close?

subtasks.title: Persist and cache market snapshots
subtasks.details: Write latest market snapshots to Redis and append raw stream pointers for replay/debug.
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot keys available for subscribed strikes.
Replay job can reconstruct candles for selected intervals.
questions: How long should raw tick retention be kept?
